name: upnp-static
description: Bring up the baseline single-router UPnP lab and verify a real WAN-side dhtnet session plus the UPnP mapping it creates.
notes: This is the baseline composition scenario: topology bring-up, reusable fixtures, managed dhtnet actor launch, IGD discovery, WAN dhtnet roundtrip, and teardown.
The runner starts a local OpenDHT bootstrap fixture and a miniupnpd router fixture directly instead of going through setup wrapper scripts.
If your dhtnet binaries are not under <repo>/build, set DHTNET_BUILD_DIR before running the scenario.
The WAN probe writes a dedicated result bundle under the scenario artifacts and its summary is copied into captures/ for easier review.
